title: Add session cleanup utility
description: Create `cleanExpiredSessions(store: SessionStore, maxAgeMs: number): number` in `src/auth/session-cleanup.ts` that removes sessions where createdAt is older than maxAgeMs and returns the count of removed sessions. Include comprehensive tests in `src/auth/session-cleanup.test.ts`.
existing_patterns: src/auth/session-store.ts - Session interface with createdAt, expiresAt, refreshExpiresAt fields and SessionStore class with revoke() method
src/utils/retry.ts - single-function utility module pattern with typed options
src/utils/result.ts - discriminated union Result type for explicit error handling (may be useful for return type)
